creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-08-06 10:39:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/xoops            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/xoops/files      pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  XOOPS is an extensible, OO (Object Oriented), easy
  to use dynamic web content management system written
  in PHP. XOOPS is the ideal tool for developing small
  to large dynamic community websites, intra company
  portals, corporate portals, weblogs and much more.
  
  WWW: http://www.xoops.org/
  
  PR:             ports/126194
  Submitted by:   Wen heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2112    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/www/xoops/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/xoops/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/xoops/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +745 -0    ports/www/xoops/pkg-plist (new)
